name: All City Corporate TRNSP
notes: Likely 'All City Corporate Transportation Inc.' — a NYC TLC-licensed Black Car / luxury sedan base (B00277), NOT a school bus operator. Operates as a cooperative since 1979; introduced luxury sedans 1982. Operating addresses: 1440 39th Street, Brooklyn NY 11218 and 349 Grand Concourse, Bronx NY 10451. The input HQ '100 Plaza Dr, Buffalo NY 14221' matches CT Corporation System's NY State process-service / registered-agent address (Williamsville/Amherst area), not an operating location. No matching SAFER/FMCSA carrier record found for 'All City Corporate' in NY; the only 'ALL CITY CORPORATION' (USDOT 2670741) is in Venice CA. Black-car services often do not require USDOT registration if operating only intrastate under 26,001 lbs. Not a Summit School Services tuck-in fit.

name: Pat Zanchelli Inc
fmcsa_status: Active (USDOT active; operating authority Not Authorized for interstate for-hire)
registry_source: NY Department of State (Division of Corporations) - Domestic Business Corporation, Columbia County
notes: Confirmed SAFER match: USDOT 967104, address ties to input. Fleet breakdown per FMCSA: 14 school buses (16+ pax), 1 school bus (9-15 pax), 4 vans. MCS-150 last updated 06/28/2023; FMCSA notes 'Carrier Registration Information Outdated.' Zero inspections / zero crashes in last 24 months. Phone (518) 537-6592. DBA 'Pat's Auto Repair'; provides school bus service to Hudson Valley districts (Hudson, Saugerties, Catskill, Athens, Tivoli, Elizaville, Palenville, Leeds, Livingston, Malden On Hudson). NY inc date 5/22/1989 per nycompanyregistry.com.

name: Consolidated Bus Co
fmcsa_status: Active (USDOT active; intrastate; operating authority Not Authorized for interstate for-hire)
notes: Best-match entity: 'CONSOLIDATED BUS TRANSIT INC' (USDOT 4036598). The input HQ '191 Bruckner Blvd, Bronx NY 10454' is consistent with a CBT depot/yard - CBT operates multiple Bronx depots including 2350 Hermany Ave and 660 Zerega Ave per public listings, plus the Snediker Ave Brooklyn HQ on SAFER. Company has provided NYC student transportation / paratransit / charter services for 40+ years. MCS-150 form date 05/08/2025 (current). 9 injury crashes reported in last 24 months; 0 roadside inspections. Match confidence is medium because input HQ address (Bruckner Blvd) doesn't directly appear in SAFER physical address field, though CBT's multi-depot Bronx footprint makes this the only plausible 'Consolidated Bus' in NY. NY DOS inc_date not verified in this pass.
